prerequisites: A ChartMogul account with access to the API Keys section under your profile settings.
A ChartMogul API key (created under Profile > View Profile > API Keys).
A start date (start_date) marking the earliest point from which to replicate data.

authMethods.name: API Key (HTTP Basic Auth)
authMethods.summary: ChartMogul uses your API key for authentication. The key (the api_key secret field) is supplied as the username in HTTP Basic Auth credentials on every request; the password may be left empty or set to the same API key value.

setupSteps.title: Create a ChartMogul API key
setupSteps.body: In the ChartMogul app, go to Profile > View Profile, then select API Keys in the sidebar and click ADD API KEY to generate a new key. Copy the key value.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated key into the required api_key field. The connector authenticates by sending this key as the username with HTTP Basic Auth (password empty or equal to the key).

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Enter a value in the required start_date field to define the earliest date from which the connector replicates data.
